card.name: CU03 — Great Girros
card.text: Exhaust — {2}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Legiana
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, tap target creature they control and create a Stagger Blight attached to it. (If enchanted creature would untap, its controller destroys a Stagger Blight on it instead.) Salvage {1}{W}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard transformed for its Salvage cost by sacrificing an artifact or exiling another card with salvage from your graveyard.) --- (Back): Snowfletcher

card.name: Snowfletcher
card.text: Salvaged (When this enters, attach it to target creature you control. If it would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Whenever equipped creature attacks, tap target creature defending player controls. Equip {2} --- (Front): Legiana

card.name: Swiftstrike Hunter
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever you attack, choose target attacking creature. Attach up to one target Equipment you control to it, then it gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of equipped creatures you control.

card.name: Resourceful Hunter
card.text: Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, if a source you controlled dealt damage to it this turn, create a Component token. This ability triggers only once each turn. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.")

card.name: Prepare for the Hunt
card.text: Distribute three counters among one, two or three target creatures you control. For each counter, choose what kind it is from among +1/+1, vigilance, and trample. You gain 3 life.

card.name: The Meowscular Chef
card.text: Whenever The Meowscular Chef enters or attacks, you may exile target creature card from a graveyard. If you do, create a Food token. Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on target Ranger you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Lagombi
card.text: Flash Prevent all damage that would be dealt to this creature as long as it entered this turn.

card.name: CG02 — Gargwa // Golden Find
card.text:
This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) When this creature dies, if it wasn't prepared, draw a card.
---
Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Third Fleet Master
card.text: Modified creatures you control get +1/+1 and have ward {X}, where X is the number of modifications they have. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.) Noncreature, non-Equipment artifacts you control are Equipment in addition to their other types and have equip {1}.

card.name: Tobi-Kadachi
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature attacks, it deals 1 damage to target creature defending player controls. That creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Elder Fugen of Kamura
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gains first strike until end of turn. Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it and draw a card.

card.name: Hunter's Companions
card.text: Create a 1/1 white Cat Ranger creature token, and a 2/2 green Dog Ranger creature token. Put an exalted counter on each of them. (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each instance of exalted among your permanents.)

card.name: Seltas Queen
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 black Insect creature token with flying named Seltas. {1}, Sacrifice a token: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it. Salvage {1}{W}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard transformed for its Salvage cost by sacrificing an artifact or exiling another card with salvage from your graveyard.) --- (Back): Seltas Cannon

card.name: Seltas Cannon
card.text: Salvaged (When this enters, attach it to target creature you control. If it would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.) Equipped creature gets +2/+0. {1}, Sacrifice a token: Equipped creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it. Equip {2} --- (Front): Seltas Queen

card.name: CW02 — Bonded Hunter
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one— • Create a 1/1 white Insect creature token with flying. • Put a +1/+1 counter and a vigilance counter on this creature.

card.name: CG01 — Helpful Grimalkyne
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn. When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white Cat Ranger creature token.

card.name: Part Break
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, remove all counters from enchanted creature and create a tapped Component token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.") Enchanted creature gets -2/-2.

card.name: CG13 — Vigorwasp Spray
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to it this turn.

card.name: CG04 — Guardian Palamute
card.text: Vigilance Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CB04 — Pukei-Pukei
card.text: Flying, deathtouch Whenever you invade, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent. (You invade when you cast spells from outside your hand, or nontoken creatures you control that weren't cast enter.)

card.name: Frenzy Virus
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +4/+2 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, remove all -1/-1 counters from it." At the beginning of your upkeep, put a -1/-1 counter on enchanted creature.

card.name: Mizutsune
card.text: Vigilance Blights you control have indestructible. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player,

card.name: Malfestio
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, you may capitalize {3}. If you do, you gain 3 life and draw a card. (For capitalize costs, removing counters from your creatures and sacrificing artifacts and/or tokens helps pay. Each counter pays for {1}, and each permanent sacrificed pays for {2}.)

card.name: Chain of Predation
card.text: When this enchantment enters, mill three cards. Each creature card in your graveyard has scavenge. The scavenge cost is equal to its mana cost reduced by {B}{G}. (Exile a creature card from your graveyard and pay its scavenge cost: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to that card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery. The reduction can reduce generic costs.)

card.name: CA04 — Dung Bomb
card.text: Flash When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap target creature. If it's attacking, remove it from combat. Put a stun counter on it.

card.name: CU04 — Gypceros
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, tap target creature defending player controls.

card.name: CA06 — Bubble Fox Soap
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Remove all counters from target creature. Unattach all Equipment from it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CR04 — Aknosom
card.text: During your turn, this creature has flying. When this creature enters, create a Blast Blight token attached to up to one target creature. (If enchanted creature would be dealt damage, it's dealt twice that much damage instead. Then, destroy this Blight.)

card.name: CW01 — Inspiring Palico
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. {1}, {T}, Remove a counter from a creature you control: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Odogaron
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Whenever you invade, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (You invade when you cast spells from outside your hand, or nontoken creatures you control that weren't cast enter.) card.name: Valorous Stance
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. • Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater.

card.name: Zoh Shia, Ultimate Guardian
card.text: Trample, lifelink Whenever Zoh Shia deals combat damage to a player, put that many cocoon counters on it. {W}{B}, Pay X life, Remove X cocoon counters from Zoh Shia: Return target creature card with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a finality counter on it. It's an artifact in addition to its other types.

card.name: Najarala
card.text: Vigilance This creature enters with a number of +1/+1 counters on it equal to the amount of mana spent to cast it. Whenever this creature attacks, you may remove a counter from it. If you do, it can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Breakneck Escape
card.text: Return target permanent you own and all Auras you own attached to it to your hand. If it was a modified creature, draw a card. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Gemma of Avis Unit
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose another target creature you control. For each Aura and Equipment you control attached to Gemma, create a token that's a copy of it attached to the chosen creature. Each of those tokens has "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this token."

card.name: Fiorayne, Knight of Elgado
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Fiorayne attacks, create a 1/1 red Human Ranger creature token that's tapped and attacking if she's equipped. Do the same for if she's enchanted, and for if she has a counter on her.

card.name: Fiorayne, Knight of Elgado
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Fiorayne attacks, create a 1/1 red Human Ranger creature token that's tapped and attacking if she's equipped. Do the same for if she's enchanted and for if she has a counter on her.

card.name: Nargacuga, Pouncing Shadow
card.text: Flash When Nargacuga enters, until your next turn, spells you cast from your graveyard or from exile can be cast as though they had flash. Those spells cost {1} less to cast. {1}, Exile two cards from your graveyard: You may cast target permanent card from your graveyard this turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: CG12 — Crushing Impact
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: CW14 — Impenetrable Winds
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast during a main phase. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: CG03 — Migratory Seikret
card.text: Trample {2}{G}: This creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control. Activate only if this creature is attacking alone and only once each turn.

card.text: Menace This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if an opponent lost life this turn.

card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, attach up to one target Equipment you control to it.

card.text: This spell deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Deviljho

card.name: CR12 — Mining Mission

card.name: Phialcharged Strike
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. If the creature you control has power or toughness greater than its base value, you may have excess damage be dealt to the other creature's controller instead.

card.name: Ahtal-Ka
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Component token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. card.name: CB03 — Effluvium Raphinos
card.text: Flying, lifelink This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. When this creature dies, each player loses 2 life.

card.name: Vaal Hazak, the Corpse-Coated
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, capitalize {X}. This spell costs {X} less to cast. (For capitalize costs, removing counters from your creatures and sacrificing artifacts and/or tokens helps pay. Each counter pays for {1}, and each permanent sacrificed pays for {2}.) Flying, lifelink At the beginning of your end step, create a 0/0 black Germ creature token. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of permanents you sacrificed this turn.

card.name: CR08 — Tetsucabra
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, discard a card, then draw a card. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Placid Arzuros
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Pyre Rakna-Kadaki
card.text: Menace, reach Whenever you invade, create a 2/1 red Spider creature token with reach. (You invade when you cast spells from outside your hand, or nontoken creatures you control that weren't cast enter.)

card.name: CG03 — Migratory Seikret
card.text: Trample {2}{G}: This creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control. Activate only if this creature is attacking alone and only once each turn.

card.name: CU07 — Royal Ludroth
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you capitalize {2} as an additional cost to cast it. (For capitalize costs, removing counters from your creatures and sacrificing artifacts and/or tokens helps pay. Each counter pays for {1}, and each permanent sacrificed pays for {2}.) Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CB13 — Lurking Khezu
card.text: Quarry {2}{B} — 5/ (You may cast this as a battle an opponent protects. Remove a defense counter at the beginning of your upkeep. It becomes a creature once defeated.) Flying When this permanent enters, target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Fated Emergence
card.text: Mill five cards, then put up to four creature cards with total mana value X or less from your hand and/or graveyard onto the battlefield, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Shah Dalamadur
card.text: Trample, indestructible Shah Dalamadur enters tapped with a +1/+1 counter on it. If Shah Dalamadur would untap, if its power is less than 30, it doesn't untap. Whenever a source you control deals damage, put that many +1/+1 counters on Shah Dalamadur.

card.name: Gammoth
card.text: Vigilance Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, if it doesn't have a shield counter on it, put one on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Whenever one or more counters are removed from a creature you control, draw a card.

card.name: Wyverian Scout
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever another creature you control attacks alone, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Cohoot
card.text: Flying Whenever another creature you control attacks alone, mill a card. If that card is a land, put it into your hand. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.

card.name: Bunny Dango
card.text: When you cast this spell, copy it. (The copy becomes a token.) {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target player gains 3 life. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CU12 — Aerial Style
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. You may cast this spell from your graveyard by paying {3}{U} rather than paying its mana cost.

card.name: Gore Magala, Nascent Elder
card.text: Trample Whenever Gore Magala enters or attacks, choose any number of target creatures controlled by different players. For each of those creatures, create a Frenzy Blight token attached to it. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and attacks each combat if able.) Whenever an attacking creature dies, its controller loses 2 life. Put a +1/+1 counter on Gore Magala.

card.name: Glavenus
card.text: When this creature enters, create a colorless Equipment artifact token named Flaming Blade with "Equipped creature gets +2/+0." and equip {2}. Attach it to this creature. Whenever one or more equipped creatures you control attack a player, mill a card. You may cast it. If you don't, this creature deals 2 damage to defending player and you gain 2 life.

card.name: CB08 — Swiftshadow Rescuer
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: CB07 — Radobaan
card.text: Menace Whenever you invade, this creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. (You invade when you cast spells from outside your hand, or nontoken creatures you control that weren't cast enter.)

card.name: CR15 — Destructive Emergence
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it isn't being cast from your hand or if it targets a battle. Destructive Emergence deals 6 damage to target creature or battle.

card.name: CU15 — Snap Out Of It!
card.text: Choose one — • Draw two cards, then discard a card. • Untap target creature. Draw a card.

card.name: Wyverian Chief
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Tokens you control have exalted. (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each instance of exalted among your permanents.)

card.name: CR03 — Great Wroggi
card.text: {1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Salvage {1}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard transformed for its Salvage cost by sacrificing an artifact or exiling another card with salvage from your graveyard.) --- (Back): Desperado's Gear

card.name: Desperado's Gear
card.text: Salvaged (When this enters, attach it to target creature you control. If it would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.) Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has "{1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn." Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.) --- (Front): CR03 — Great Wroggi

card.name: Fulgur Stalker
card.text: Whenever you invade, target creature you control with base power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn. (You invade when you cast spells from outside your hand, or nontoken creatures you control that weren't cast enter.)

card.name: CU11 — Catnap
card.text: Target creature phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) If you cast this spell during your main phase, draw a card.

card.name: Azure Flame Heavyweight
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, double its power until end of turn. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.text: {1}, Sacrifice a token: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only once each turn.

card.text: When this Equipment enters, create a 1/1 red Human Ranger creature token and attach this Equipment to it. Equipped creature gets +2/+1. card.name: Frederica, Valux Princess

card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this Aura enters, put a shield counter on enchanted creature. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.

card.name: Weapon Maintenance
card.text: When this enchantment enters, choose target equipment card or card with salvage in your graveyard. Return it to the battlefield. card.name: Nakarkos, Insatiable Skeleton
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a creature. Whenever one or more permanent cards are put into graveyards from anywhere, exile them and put a +1/+1 counter on Nakarkos. You may cast spells exiled with Nakarkos and spend mana of any type to cast them by removing two counters from Nakarkos in addition to paying their other costs.

card.name: Nakarkos, Insatiable Skeleton
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a creature. Whenever one or more permanent cards are put into graveyards from anywhere, exile them and put a +1/+1 counter on Nakarkos. You may cast permanent spells exiled with Nakarkos and spend mana of any type to cast them by removing two counters from Nakarkos in addition to paying their other costs.

card.name: Indomitable Rey Dau
card.text: Flying Whenever a player casts a spell other than their first spell during each of their turns, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Whenever this creature attacks alone, it gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of counters on it.

card.name: CG13 — Supply Restock
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If this spell was cast from anywhere other than your hand, create a Food token. Flashback {1}{G}. Flashback only as a sorcery. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: CW04 — Crafty Hunter
card.text: When this creature enters, you may capitalize {2}. If you do, draw a card. (For capitalize costs, removing counters from your creatures and sacrificing artifacts and/or tokens helps pay. Each counter pays for {1}, and each permanent sacrificed pays for {2}.)

card.name: CW15 — Power Chord
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, put two +1/+1 counters on that creature instead.

card.name: Snapping Uth Duna
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) If an ability of a permanent you control triggers, if it isn't your turn, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Rimeclad Jin Dahaad
card.text: This creature must be blocked if able. Whenever this creature deals damage to a creature an opponent controls, if that creature was dealt excess damage this turn, destroy target noncreature, nonbasic permanent that player controls with mana value less than or equal to the excess.

card.name: Blazing Nu Udra
card.text: This creature enters with eight oil counters on it. This creature gets +1/+1 for each counter on it. If this creature would be dealt damage while it has an oil counter on it, instead prevent that damage and remove one from it. If the source of that damage was a creature, this creature deals that much damage to that creature. Otherwise, it deals that damage to that source's controller.
